title: How to export monday.com data to Tableau?
excerpt:

I hope you’re all doing well. I wanted to kick off a discussion about the Tableau Connector for monday.com. Many of us use Tableau for monday.com data visualization, and integrating it with monday.com i…

posts.author: yuliamai (Yuliia Maidanova)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Community!

I hope you’re all doing well. I wanted to kick off a discussion about the Tableau Connector for monday.com. Many of us use Tableau for monday.com data visualization, and integrating it with monday.com is the key solution to the challenge of efficiently exporting data.

Here are a couple of points to get the conversation started:

  1. Have you used the Tableau Connector for monday.com? Share your experiences — what worked well, any challenges you faced, and valuable tips.
  2. Besides the Tableau Connector, are there other methods you prefer for connecting Tableau and monday.com? Third-party tools, custom scripts — what works best?
  3. If you had to choose one method to connect Tableau and monday.com, what would it be, and why? Are there specific advantages or unique features that make it your go-to choice?

Looking forward to hearing your thoughts!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Yuliia!

Charlotte here from the monday team!

While I can’t speak from any personal experience using Tableau, I wanted to see if you had taken a look at this app that allows you to connect monday & Tableau.

Perhaps it can help you with the export!

Let me know what you think!
